hooks.text: Same supplier, same twenty thousand dollar order, same day. Pay in US dollars and it costs you three hundred sixty dollars more than paying in CNY. Nothing else changed.
There is one number that tells you exactly how much US dollars cost you over CNY on a twenty thousand dollar supplier payment. Here is the math, line by line.
On a twenty thousand dollar order, paying your supplier in US dollars leaks three hundred sixty dollars. Run twelve orders a year and that is over three thousand dollars gone.
A business owner ran the numbers on his last twenty thousand dollar wire. US dollars cost three hundred sixty dollars more than CNY, and four days slower. He had paid that gap all year.
Every twenty thousand dollar order you pay in US dollars instead of CNY, you lose around three hundred sixty dollars to two hidden conversions you never see on the receipt.
